summary: Made three surgical seam edits: carried the black folio forward from chapter 3 into the library opening, replaced a calibration-only dialogue line, and shifted the closing emphasis toward Draco being kept out of the library so the chapter exits on a more distinct handoff beat.
edits: Referenced the black folio beside Hermione in the opening library scene to preserve chapter 3 object continuity.
Replaced the exact calibration-only line "Mm." with fresh dialogue.
Adjusted the final beat to emphasize the Manor excluding Draco rather than repeating a broader house-attention close.
